title: OmniFormatter lang-css Configuration Schema
description: Configuration for CSS, SCSS, Less, and HTML. Defaults match Prettier 3.x.

printWidth.description: Maximum line length in display columns.

tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indent level.

useTabs.description: Indent with tabs instead of spaces.

singleQuote.description: Use single quotes in CSS attribute selectors and values.

htmlWhitespaceSensitivity.description: How to handle whitespace in HTML. 'css' follows CSS display property semantics.

vueIndentScriptAndStyle.description: Indent <script> and <style> blocks in Vue SFC files.
